when i was 16 and a few months into dating my first gf she was visiting at my parents' house.

she and i were just about to leave, but i was going to change first. however my mind blanked and without fully changing i went to grab something from another room. 

peacefully strutted in front of all of them in my boxers. parents immediately understood what phase the relationship had reached. 

in hindsight it was pretty good.
speedran through all the upcoming awkwardness.

10/10, didn't even realize what happened before i was out the door
